expect: history_integrity.py attribution rate improves by excluding restore/re-add false negatives and experiment outcome completeness rises by recognizing verdict/results/diff schemas; report names concrete remaining misses

tool_changes: lesson sampling now sorts by numeric lesson id instead of lexicographic filename order
creation-session detection now selects the oldest non-restore add commit instead of the newest restore/re-add
experiment schema detection now parses nested JSON keys and recognizes modern expectation/outcome fields such as expect, hypothesis, verdict, results, result, and diff-with-expectation context

residual_misses.root_cause: These are real mismatches: the add commit is a modern 2026 commit whose subject is incorrectly tagged [S3], so the metric should surface them rather than suppress them.

diff.attribution: Expected false-zero attribution to recover. Actual recovered from 0% to 92%; remaining misses are a small named cluster, not a restore-history artifact.
diff.outcomes: Expected recent outcome completeness to clear the 80% target. Actual reached 97% after schema-aware detection.
diff.expectations: Bonus fix: expectation completeness was also undercounted because most recent artifacts use expect/hypothesis/prediction rather than expected. Actual reached 92%.
